ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., European, French, Italian, UK/US) */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Region code (e.g., EU, FR, IT, UK, US) */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code for the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language used in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., shirts, pants, dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_image" TEXT /* Image representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the product belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the product */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the product */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the product */,
  "materials" TEXT /* Materials used in the product */,
  "colors" TEXT /* Colors available for the product */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the brand */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the brand */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Social media handles of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the size chart is applicable (e.g., European, French, Italian, UK/US) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of clothing (e.g., shirts, pants, dresses) */,
  "xs" INTEGER /* Size value for XS */,
  "s" INTEGER /* Size value for S */,
  "m" INTEGER /* Size value for M */,
  "l" INTEGER /* Size value for L */,
  "xl" INTEGER /* Size value for XL */,
  "xxl" INTEGER /* Size value for XXL */,
  "xxxl" INTEGER /* Size value for XXXL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL, XXL, XXXL) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in inventory */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Storage location of the inventory */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the inventory (e.g., new, used, refurbished) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL, XXL, XXXL) */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sale (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return record */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale being returned */,
  "reason_code" TEXT /* Reason code for the return */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the return (e.g., refund, replacement, store credit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, employee) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., sales, marketing, customer support) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips" REAL /* Hips measurement in inches */,
  "height" REAL /* Height in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight in pounds */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length in inches */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation record */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer measurement */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended size for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES customer_measurements ("measurement_id")
)
